raw_consumer_statement:
To Whom it may concern, I lost my Citibank Double cash card alongside my wallet which included my Driver 's License and all other credit cards few weeks ago while I was away on a trip. 
Upon returning, I discovered that a bunch of unauthorized charges were made on the lost Citi Double Cash card, I immediately notified Citi of the problem and was reassured that I am not liable for those unauthorized charges. Today is XX/XX/year> and still I have not received finalized credit for those unauthorized charges as Citi Promised.
